public_repo_notice: This repository contains public-safe structured metadata and generated artifacts. Seed-only directory material is not republished.
license_notice: Original code and structured metadata are MIT licensed unless otherwise noted. Referenced source materials keep their own license status.
consumption_notes: Use dist/graph.json for office/program/person/funding relationship data.
Use dist/search-index.json for simple client-side search.
Use dist/changelog.json for generated build events and candidate changes.
Use dist/manifest.json to inspect artifact versioning and record counts.
Do not parse raw YAML at runtime in downstream consumers.
